svg.title: LQoSync-in-Rust: backend core migration map
svg.desc: Shows which Python modules stay as-is and which convert to Rust, with IPC boundary in the middle

g.text: Flask app.py · Jinja2 templates · static assets

svg.text: IPC boundary — JSON over Unix socket / stdio

g.text: replaces engine/ · applier/ · builders/ · collectors/ · parsers/ · rules/ · validators/
